description: Composition Black sweater made of 100% acrylic, has a shawl collar, full sleeves and tie-ups below the bust Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine or hand wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Reshape and flat dry Cool iron if required A perfect ensemble for your winter wardrobe, this sweater from jealous 21 is crafted from soft knit acrylic in fashionable cuts to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style. Layer it over slim Fit jeans and tops. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26"
